name: estacionate-mvp
description: Estaciónate MVP - Parking reservation platform for Chilean buildings

scripts.build: npm run build:frontend && npm run build:backend
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd frontend && npm install && cd ../backend && npm install
scripts.test: npm run test:backend && npm run test:frontend
scripts.test:e2e:autopilot: cd frontend && npx playwright test -c playwright.autopilot.config.ts ../tests
scripts.lint: npm run lint:backend && npm run lint:frontend
scripts.format: prettier --write --ignore-unknown AGENTS.md README.md CONTRIBUTING.md RUNBOOK.md frontend/README.md package.json prettier.config.cjs .markdown-link-check.json "documentation/**/*.md" ".github/workflows/*.yml"
scripts.format:check: prettier --check --ignore-unknown AGENTS.md README.md CONTRIBUTING.md RUNBOOK.md frontend/README.md package.json prettier.config.cjs .markdown-link-check.json "documentation/**/*.md" ".github/workflows/*.yml"
scripts.check:all: npm run lint && npm run build && npm run test && npm run audit:arch

author: Estaciónate Team
